coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加3层[Laceration]
[OnSucceedAttack] 使目标增加4级[Vibration]强度

[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加4层[Laceration]
[OnSucceedAttack] 使目标增加5级[Vibration]强度
[OnSucceedAttackHead] 对目标施加2层[Paralysis]

[OnSucceedAttackTail] 使目标[VibrationExplosion]

2030511.name: 倒塌的石塔
2030511.desc: 击杀带有[Laceration]的敌方单位时，使自身增加2级[Breath] 强度并使自身获得2层[Breath] (每回合最多3次)
